title: Telegram Bridge Configuration
description: Configuration for the pi-tobis-extensions Telegram bridge. Add "$schema": "https://pi.earendil.works/schemas/telegram-config.json" to your telegram.json for IDE validation.

allowedUserId.description: Primary authorized user ID. Auto-set on first pairing.

whitelist.description: Pre-approved user IDs. Users not on this list trigger a confirmation prompt in the Pi TUI.

blacklist.description: Blocked user IDs. Blacklisted users are silently ignored.

topics.description: Enable forum topics for per-session routing. Default: true.

media.description: Media processors keyed by Telegram message type. Set to null to explicitly disable a type.

mediaProcessor.description: Configuration for processing a Telegram media type.

url.description: API endpoint URL (not used by bash mode).

api.description: Request/response format: openai-stt (speech-to-text), openai-chat (vision/chat), bash (shell command with {file}).

model.description: Model name (used by openai-stt and openai-chat).

api_key.description: API key sent as Bearer token.

command.description: Shell command template for bash mode. {file} is replaced with the downloaded file path.

oneOf.description: Explicitly disable processing for this media type.
